_comment: Pre-computed demo scenarios for Agent 11 Model Risk Management Agent. Used when OPENAI_API_KEY is absent or in demo mode. Each scenario represents a real SR 11-7 validation event type with realistic metrics and findings.

scenarios.label: Agent 02 TMS Enhancement — Annual Revalidation
scenarios.description: Scheduled annual revalidation of the false positive probability composite model. Model is performing within acceptable bounds with minor PSI trend noted.

computed_output.findings_summary: Annual revalidation of AGT02-FP-SCORE-v1. All metrics within acceptable tolerance. No degradation flags triggered. PSI is STABLE at 0.09 (just below 0.10 WARNING threshold — monitor). HIGH-tier model requires MRO sign-off. Recommended outcome: APPROVED.

scenarios.label: Agent 04 Fraud Detection — Triggered Review (Performance Degradation)
scenarios.description: Triggered review after monitoring detected Gini coefficient decline of 12.3 points over 90 days. HIGH-tier model with material degradation — immediate MRO and CRO review required.

input.triggering_event: Gini coefficient declined 12.3 points in 90-day monitoring window. Alert threshold: 10 points. Automated trigger from CloudWatch model monitoring alarm.

material_findings: Model accuracy declined 5.7pp — exceeds 5pp degradation threshold. Investigation required.
Gini coefficient declined 12.3 points — exceeds 10-point threshold. Model has lost discriminatory power — likely population shift or concept drift.
False positive rate increased 8.1pp — analyst efficiency impact.
False negative rate increased 8.9pp — model missing significantly more fraud. Regulatory and financial risk.
Challenger model outperforms production: Gini 69.4 vs 57.8 (11.6 point advantage). Model replacement should be evaluated.
computed_output.findings_summary: CRITICAL: AGT04-FRAUD-SCORE-v1 shows material performance degradation across all primary metrics. Gini declined 12.3 points (threshold: 10). FNR increased 8.9pp — the model is missing significantly more fraud events. PSI is 0.19 (WARNING) — population shift detected. Challenger model outperforms production by 11.6 Gini points. Immediate CRO review required. Recommended outcome: CONDITIONALLY_APPROVED pending remediation plan with 30-day implementation deadline.

scenarios.label: Agent 08 Credit Underwriting — Initial Validation (New Challenger)
scenarios.description: Initial validation of a challenger credit underwriting model proposed to replace the production v1 model. Challenger shows improved performance on Gini and KS but introduces a new data feature requiring fair lending assessment.

input.triggering_event: Challenger model AGT08-CREDIT-SCORE-v2 submitted for initial validation. Proposes adding rental payment history as new scoring feature (Fannie Mae DU 11.0 compatible). Fair lending assessment required for new feature.

material_findings: FAIR_LENDING_FLAG: New feature 'rental_payment_history' requires fair lending disparate impact testing. Census tract correlation analysis required before production deployment. ECOA/Reg B — 15 CFR Part 202.
Challenger model outperforms production: Gini 71.4 vs 65.2 (6.2 point advantage). Challenger deployment recommended pending fair lending clearance.
computed_output.findings_summary: Initial validation of AGT08 challenger model. Production model metrics are stable. Challenger shows 6.2 Gini point improvement. CONDITION: fair lending disparate impact assessment for new 'rental_payment_history' feature must be completed and cleared by Fair Lending Officer before challenger is deployed to production. MRO sign-off required. Recommended outcome: CONDITIONALLY_APPROVED pending fair lending clearance.

scenarios.label: Agent 03 KYC Risk Model — Ongoing Monthly Monitoring
scenarios.description: Routine monthly monitoring of the 8-factor KYC customer risk score. All metrics stable. PSI within bounds. Auto-resolvable with monitoring notes — no HITL required for MEDIUM-tier monitoring event.

computed_output.findings_summary: Monthly monitoring — AGT03-KYC-RISK-v1. All metrics stable. PSI STABLE at 0.06. No degradation flags. No HITL required for ONGOING_MONITORING at this performance level. Monitoring notes recorded to audit trail. Next full annual revalidation due 2027-02-01.
